+class CLIPDataset(torch.utils.data.Dataset):

+    """Wrapper that applies transforms."""

+    def __init__(self, base_dataset, transform):

+        self.base = base_dataset

+        self.transform = transform

+

+    def __len__(self):

+        return len(self.base)

+

+    def __getitem__(self, idx):

+        image, label = self.base[idx]

+        return self.transform(image), label

+

+

+def compute_class_weights(dataset):

+    """Compute inverse-frequency class weights from labels."""

+    labels = [label for _, label in dataset.samples]

     counts = np.bincount(labels, minlength=182)

-    counts = np.maximum(counts, 1)  # avoid zero

+    counts = np.maximum(counts, 1)  # avoid zero weight

     weights = 1.0 / counts

-    weights = weights / weights.sum() * len(weights)

+    weights = weights / weights.sum() * 182

     return torch.tensor(weights, dtype=torch.float32)

+

+

+def gather_val_results(local_preds, local_labels):

+    """Gather predictions and labels from all processes to rank 0."""

+    world_size = dist.get_world_size()

+    # Convert to lists for gather_object

+    gathered_preds = [None] * world_size if dist.get_rank() == 0 else None

+    gathered_labels = [None] * world_size if dist.get_rank() == 0 else None

+    dist.gather_object(local_preds, gathered_preds, dst=0)

+    dist.gather_object(local_labels, gathered_labels, dst=0)

+    if dist.get_rank() == 0:

+        all_preds = []

+        all_labels = []

+        for p, l in zip(gathered_preds, gathered_labels):

+            all_preds.extend(p)

+            all_labels.extend(l)

+        return all_preds, all_labels

+    return None, None

+    base_val = WildlifeDataset(args.data_dir, 'val.txt')

+

+    # Subset training data for fast experimentation

+    if args.train_frac < 1.0:

+        n_total = len(base_train)

+        n_subset = max(1, int(n_total * args.train_frac))

+        # Same indices across all processes (using same seed)

+        rng = random.Random(args.seed)

+        indices = rng.sample(range(n_total), n_subset)

+        train_data = Subset(base_train, indices)

+    else:

+        train_data = base_train

+

+    # Apply transforms

+    train_dataset = CLIPDataset(train_data, get_transforms(train=True))

+    val_dataset = CLIPDataset(base_val, get_transforms(train=False))

+

+    # Create distributed samplers

+    train_sampler = DistributedSampler(train_dataset, num_replicas=world_size, rank=global_rank, shuffle=True, seed=args.seed)

+    val_sampler = DistributedSampler(val_dataset, num_replicas=world_size, rank=global_rank, shuffle=False)

+

+    # DataLoaders

+    train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=args.batch_size, sampler=train_sampler,

+                              num_workers=2, pin_memory=True, drop_last=True)

+    val_loader = DataLoader(val_dataset, batch_size=args.batch_size, sampler=val_sampler,

+                            num_workers=2, pin_memory=True)

+

+    # Model

+    model = CLIPWildlifeClassifier(model_name='openai/clip-vit-base-patch16', num_classes=182, dropout=0.1)

+    model = model.to(device)

+    model = DDP(model, device_ids=[local_rank], output_device=local_rank, find_unused_parameters=True)

+

+    # Class weights

+    class_weights = compute_class_weights(base_train).to(device)

+

+    # Loss

+    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(weight=class_weights, reduction='mean')

+

+    # Optimizer & scheduler

+    scheduler = CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=args.epochs, eta_min=1e-6)

+

+    # Mixed precision

+    scaler = GradScaler()

+
